Class AbstractContextNode<T>

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context.AbstractContextNode<T>
Type Parameters:
T - The type of the underlying domain object wrapped by this node.
Direct Known Subclasses:
ContextManagerNode, ContextProviderNode, HistoryNode, MessageNode, PartNode, ResourceNode, ResourcesNode, ToolkitNode, ToolManagerNode, ToolNode, ToolsNode
public abstract class AbstractContextNode<T> extends Object
The base class for all nodes in the hierarchical context tree.

This class provides a unified interface for the ContextTreeTableModel to interact with different types of domain objects (Providers, Toolkits, Tools) while maintaining a consistent JNDI-style view.

It implements a hierarchical token aggregation system and an identity-preserving child synchronization mechanism to ensure UI stability during refreshes.

Author:
anahata

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractContextNode

      public AbstractContextNode()

  • Method Details

    • getAgi

      public Agi getAgi()
      Gets the parent agi session.
      Returns:
      The agi session.

    • getName

      public abstract String getName()
      Gets the human-readable display name for this node.
      Returns:
      The name to be displayed in the tree.

    • getDescription

      public abstract String getDescription()
      Gets a detailed description of the node's purpose or content.
      Returns:
      The description string.

    • getChildren

      public final List<AbstractContextNode<?>> getChildren()
      Gets the list of child nodes for this node. Implementation details: Returns the cached child list, initializing it via refresh() if necessary.
      Returns:
      A list of child AbstractContextNodes.

    • refresh

      public final void refresh()
      Refreshes the node's state, including its child list and token counts.

      This method implements an identity-preserving synchronization logic: it updates the child list by reusing existing node instances for domain objects that are still present.

    • refreshData

      public final void refreshData()
      Recursively recalculates token counts and status for this node and its descendants. This method is designed to be called from a background thread via SwingTask.

    • fetchChildObjects

      protected abstract List<?> fetchChildObjects()
      Fetches the current list of domain objects that should be represented as children of this node.
      Returns:
      A list of domain objects.

    • createChildNode

      protected abstract AbstractContextNode<?> createChildNode(Object userObject)
      Creates a new child node for the given domain object.
      Parameters:
      userObject - The domain object to wrap.
      Returns:
      A new AbstractContextNode, or null if the object type is not supported.

    • refreshTokens

      @Deprecated public final void refreshTokens()
      Deprecated.
      Use refresh() instead for a unified update.
      Recalculates and caches the token counts and status for this node and all its descendants.

    • calculateLocalTokens

      protected abstract void calculateLocalTokens()
      Calculates the token counts for this node's own content (excluding children).

    • updateStatus

      protected abstract void updateStatus()
      Updates the status string for this node.

    • getIcon

      public Icon getIcon()
      Gets an optional icon for this node by delegating to the IconProvider configured in the agi session.
      Returns:
      The icon, or null if no specialized icon is available.

    • isActive

      public abstract boolean isActive()
      Checks if the underlying domain object is currently active in the context.

      Subclasses override this method to define their specific active-state policy, allowing for clean, polymorphic evaluation without dirty instanceof chains.

      Returns:
      true if active, false otherwise.

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Equality is based on the underlying userObject and the node class.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns the display name of the node.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
